Knowledge
Define the docs, PDFs, boards, andcontext the agents use to act
Integrations
Keep work in sync across your tools without the need for handoffs
Actions
Put agents in motion across every aspect of work
24/7 Autonomy
AI agents act without time, volume, or language constraints
Guardrails
Stay in control with guardrails and full transparency into every action
Operations agents
Customer Support Agent
Reviews tickets, consults the knowledge base, and drafts relevant responses
SLA monitor agent
Tracks SLA across active tickets, flags at-risk cases, and proactively alerts managers
Vendor Researcher
Analyzes procurement requirements, researches, and prioritizes supplier lists
Process Automator
Identifies repetitive tasks across workflows and proactively suggests automations to streamline processes
Project agents
Risk Analyzer
Proactively flags tasks nearing their deadline and sends timely notifications
Task Coordinator
Transforms meeting transcripts into actionable tasks
Meeting Scheduler
Schedules and confirms meetings by finding suitable times and sending calendar invites
Follow-up Agent
Analyzes updates to identify open questions, and proactively tags the relevant stakeholders to request clarification
Marketing agents
RSVP Manager Agent
Manages event attendance by sending invitations, tracking responses, and updating participant status
Market Landscape Analyzer
Identifies new competitors, emerging technologies, and macro trends
Competitor Research Agent
Tracks key competitors and consolidates signals into a structured snapshot
Translator Agent
Automatically translates campaigns into the required language
Asset Generator
Generates visuals aligned with the messaging and creative constraints
Sales agents
Lead Agent
Automatically sources and enriches prospects
Contact Duplicates Finder
Identifies contact duplications and proactively suggests merging or removing
Sales Agent
Qualifies and books meetings automatically
Meeting Summarizer
Analyzes meetings to generate concise summaries and action items
Engineering agents
Bug Prioritization Agent
Analyzes bugs, defines severity and urgency, and determines the resolution deadline accordingly
Bug Reporter
Continuously monitors your code, identifies issues, and submits actionable bug reports
Release Notes Agent
Creates a user-facing release note that effectively communicates the value of the feature
Coding Agent
Writes, tests, and opens pull requests automatically

workflows

Up to 3 boards
Boards are the place for organizing all your work and data (e.g. projects, clients, processes).
Up to 3 Docs
Create docs and collaborate with your team in real time. As your collaboration thrives, turn those words into actions with live updated data using monday.com Real Time Engine!
200+ templates
Choose from over 200+ templates for every industry, and customize them to fit your team's needs.
8 column types
Build your board the way you want with a variety of column types.
iOS and Android apps
Stay connected on-the-go and access monday.com from your smart phone.

docs.title: Support
docs.text:

Go to homepage
Integrations & apps
Connect the tools you already use to work smarter
Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work,
enhance collaboration, and drive better business results faster.
Get Started
Connectivity
Bring all your tools together
Integrate your favorite apps in seconds to create workflows for any need - bringing every team’s work into one place and keeping it perfectly aligned.
Get Started
Efficiency
Automate every workflow
Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with to trigger automations, eliminate manual work, and keep your business in motion.
Get Started
Impact
Drive results with full visibility
Gain a real-time, cross-platform view that keeps data aligned and teams empowered — helping you make confident decisions and turn insight into measurable business impact.
Get Started
Integrations for every use case
Sales tracking
Customer support management
Code alignment
Team collaboration
Campaign optimization
Sales tracking
Close deals faster
Integrate Salesforce, Quickbooks, or HubSpot to manage leads, track opportunities, and keep your sales process proactive and results-driven.
Customer support management
Stay on top of every request
Connect Zendesk or Active Directory to manage your support tickets in monday.com, helping teams resolve issues faster and keep customers happy.
Code alignment
Keep development and delivery on track
Link pull requests from GitHub or GitLab directly to their related items in monday.com so teams can quickly access code and updates in context.
Team collaboration
Keep teams connected
Integrate your org’s communication tools - Slack, Gmail, Google Calendar, Outlook, Microsoft Teams, and more - to centralize communication and keep work flowing smoothly across channels.
Campaign optimization
Optimize campaign performance
Integrate Mailchimp, Intercom, or Google Ads to track campaign performance, refine strategies, and turn insights into growth.
“monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated.”
Naomi M.
Head of Client Success
“monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams.”
Ray A.
Director of Customer Experience
“The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed and are completed within time.”
Jim M.
Real Estate Agent
Use your go-to AI assistants
Work with tools like Claude, Copilot, and ChatGPT through official integrations or the monday MCP, and keep data secure with trusted AI connectors.
Tailor your workflows with the monday marketplace
Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations built by our trusted partners, helping you customize your workflow to your needs and add new functionality as you grow.
Explore the marketplace
Connect via no-code platforms
Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools with - no development needed.
Create a custom solution
Build your own integrations
Use our flexible APIs, SDKs to build custom apps and integrations tailored to your  unique needs.
Explore developer docs
Join as a marketplace partner
Turn your idea into monday app, reach 225,000+ customers, and grow your business on our marketplace.
Become a marketplace partner

hits.title: MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com
Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?
Why Monday.com decided to build its new database instead of buying one
Monday.com Shares Jump at IPO, Minting Cloud Software Billionaire in Israel

analysis.name: monday.com
analysis.tagline: Outpace everyone with the best AI work platform
analysis.value_proposition: An all-in-one AI work platform that lets humans and AI agents plan, execute, and automate work across projects, CRM, dev, and service operations.
analysis.ideal_customer: Operations, PMO, and cross-functional teams at mid-market to enterprise companies seeking a unified work OS across departments

features.name: boards
features.description: Core grid-based workspace for organizing tasks, projects, clients, or any data as rows and columns
features.evidence_quote: Boards are the place for organizing all your work and data (e.g. projects, clients, processes).

features.name: docs (workdocs)
features.description: Collaborative real-time documents with live board data embedded via the Real Time Engine
features.evidence_quote: Create docs and collaborate with your team in real time... turn those words into actions with live updated data

features.name: templates
features.description: 200+ pre-built templates covering every industry and use case
features.evidence_quote: Choose from over 200+ templates for every industry, and customize them to fit your team's needs.

features.name: column types
features.description: Customizable data field types for building boards; 8 types on Free, more on paid tiers
features.evidence_quote: Build your board the way you want with a variety of column types.

features.name: ios and android apps
features.description: Native mobile apps for on-the-go access
features.evidence_quote: Stay connected on-the-go and access monday.com from your smart phone.

features.name: unlimited free viewers
features.description: Read-only account access for unlimited external or internal viewers at no seat cost
features.evidence_quote: Viewers have read-only access to your account data, with no editing rights.

features.name: unlimited items
features.description: No cap on rows (items) across boards; rows can represent tasks, customers, or anything
features.evidence_quote: Items are the rows in monday.com boards. Items can be anything you want

features.name: automations
features.description: No-code rule-based workflow automation triggered by board events; action limits vary by tier
features.evidence_quote: Save precious time by automating repetitive tasks in your boards.

features.name: integrations
features.description: Two-way sync with 850+ third-party apps; action limits vary by tier
features.evidence_quote: Discover 850+ integrations and apps to centralize work, enhance collaboration

features.name: gantt chart
features.description: Timeline/Gantt view for visualizing project schedules and dependencies
features.evidence_quote: Gantt & dependencies

features.name: calendar view
features.description: Calendar visualization of board items by date
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your work on a Gantt and calendar view to keep everything on schedule.

features.name: kanban view
features.description: Kanban-style board view for visualizing status-based workflows
features.evidence_quote: Kanban

features.name: advanced board views
features.description: Charts, graphs, and diagram visualizations of board data beyond Gantt/calendar
features.evidence_quote: Visualize your data with different types of charts, graphs and diagrams.

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Cross-board reporting and analytics widgets for high-level visibility
features.evidence_quote: Reporting — Track progress and analyze your data with dashboards and views

features.name: guest access
features.description: External users can access only boards they're invited to, keeping the rest of the account private
features.evidence_quote: Guests are external users who can only access boards you invite them to

features.name: private boards and docs
features.description: Boards and docs visible only to the owner and explicitly invited members
features.evidence_quote: Private boards and docs are only visible to you and team members you invite.

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Built-in time tracking to log and monitor time spent per task
features.evidence_quote: Track and monitor the time spent on each task.

features.name: advanced columns
features.description: Dynamic dependency columns and complex automated calculations across board data
features.evidence_quote: create dynamic dependencies between tasks and perform complex automated calculations across your board's data.

features.name: formula column
features.description: Spreadsheet-style formula column for calculated fields across board data
features.evidence_quote: Formula Column

features.name: connect boards column
features.description: Column type that links items across different boards for cross-board data relationships
features.evidence_quote: Connect Boards Column

features.name: dependencies
features.description: Task-to-task dependency tracking for sequencing and scheduling
features.evidence_quote: Dependencies

features.name: portfolio management
features.description: Connect multiple projects to a unified portfolio with real-time visibility
features.evidence_quote: Connect projects to a unified portfolio with rea[l-time visibility]

features.name: board permissions
features.description: Fine-grained access control at the board level
features.evidence_quote: Board permissions

features.name: import/export excel
features.description: Import data from and export data to Excel spreadsheets
features.evidence_quote: Import & export from Excel

features.name: roles and permissions
features.description: Workspace-level roles and granular permissions management
features.evidence_quote: Roles & permissions

features.name: user authentication
features.description: SSO and identity management for enterprise user auth
features.evidence_quote: User authentication

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on via enterprise identity providers
features.evidence_quote: User authentication

features.name: enterprise security and governance
features.description: Top-tier security features and user management controls including audit logs and compliance
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise-grade security & governance — Get top-tier security features & user management controls.

features.name: enterprise-scale automations and integrations
features.description: Up to 250,000 automation and integration actions per month for enterprise accounts
features.evidence_quote: Enterprise-scale automations & integrations — Up to 250,000 automation and integration actions per month.

features.name: ai assistant (sidekick)
features.description: Context-aware personal AI assistant that understands, connects, and runs work across boards
features.evidence_quote: Sidekick is an intelligent context-aware AI assistant that understands, connects, and runs your work

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Autonomous AI agents that take on specialized tasks (PMO, sales, IT, etc.) at scale
features.evidence_quote: Agents take on specialized tasks and support multiple functions for automated execution at scale

features.name: ai meeting notetaker
features.description: AI that transcribes meetings and converts conversations into actionable board items
features.evidence_quote: Notetaker keeps your team focused during meetings and turns conversations into actionable insights

features.name: ai columns
features.description: AI-powered column that executes repetitive work directly within boards automatically
features.evidence_quote: AI columns run your repetitive work directly within your boards, so you can focus on your main priorities

features.name: ai workflow builder
features.description: Orchestrate multi-step workflows connecting AI agents across teams with no-code builder
features.evidence_quote: Orchestrate workflows that connect agents and AI and watch work get done across every team

features.name: ai credits
features.description: Monthly credit pool consumed by AI features (agents, sidekick, notetaker); bundled per tier
features.evidence_quote: 1,000 credits/month — Use your AI credits for: AI agent workforce, AI meeting notetaker, Sidekick AI assistant

features.name: vibe app builder (monday vibe)
features.description: AI-powered no-code app builder to create custom business apps from any board in minutes
features.evidence_quote: Turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes

features.name: agent builder (agent factory)
features.description: Low/no-code tool to design and deploy custom AI agents for specific business workflows
features.evidence_quote: Agent Factory — AI agent builder

features.name: pmo agent
features.description: AI agent that spots bottlenecks, creates project plans, and summarizes meetings for PMO teams
features.evidence_quote: PMO Agent — Spot bottlenecks, Create a project plan, Meeting Summarizer

features.name: sales agent
features.description: AI agent that manages leads, ranks rep performance, and imports contacts for sales teams
features.evidence_quote: Sales Agent — Lead Agent, Rep performance ranker, Import my contacts

features.name: incident resolver agent
features.description: AI agent that summarizes ticket history and resolves IT incidents automatically
features.evidence_quote: Incident Resolver — Summarize ticket history, Monitor SLAs and risks

features.name: sla monitoring agent
features.description: AI agent that monitors SLAs and flags risks proactively
features.evidence_quote: SLA Monitoring Agent — Monitor SLAs and risks

features.name: sentiment detector agent
features.description: AI agent that analyzes content or customer inputs for sentiment signals
features.evidence_quote: Sentiment Detector Agent

features.name: prd agent
features.description: AI agent for product managers that generates risk snapshots and builds roadmap plans
features.evidence_quote: PRD Agent — Get risk snapshot, Build roadmap plan

features.name: translator agent
features.description: AI agent for translating content within monday workflows
features.evidence_quote: Translator Agent

features.name: monday crm
features.description: Dedicated CRM product for managing leads, pipeline, and full customer journeys with AI
features.evidence_quote: AI-first CRM that delivers revenue — Automate full customer journeys with the most intuitive CRM

features.name: monday dev
features.description: Agile software development product for sprint management, roadmaps, and product releases
features.evidence_quote: Ship products faster, from idea to release — Plan roadmaps, manage sprints, and release products

features.name: monday service
features.description: IT service desk product with ticketing, customer portal, and SLA management
features.evidence_quote: AI service that drives resolutions at scale — Empower every team to deliver efficient service

features.name: monday campaigns
features.description: Email marketing product for managing campaigns and creative workflows
features.evidence_quote: monday campaigns — For email marketing teams

features.name: workcanvas
features.description: Digital whiteboard for visual collaboration and creative work
features.evidence_quote: Create and innovate on a digital whiteboard

features.name: workforms
features.description: Form builder for collecting requests, feedback, and data that feed into boards
features.evidence_quote: Gather requests, feedback and data all in one place

features.name: sprint management
features.description: Agile sprint planning and tracking within monday dev
features.evidence_quote: Sprint management

features.name: customer portal
features.description: Self-service portal for service desk customers to submit and track tickets
features.evidence_quote: Customer portal

features.name: mondaydb
features.description: Proprietary in-house database engine built for monday's scale and performance requirements
features.evidence_quote: MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com

features.name: monday mcp
features.description: Model Context Protocol server enabling AI tools to interact with monday data natively
features.evidence_quote: monday MCP

features.name: app marketplace
features.description: Partner-built apps and integrations to extend monday functionality
features.evidence_quote: Tailor your workflows with the monday marketplace — Enhance the monday.com experience with apps and integrations

features.name: no-code integration platform connectors
features.description: Connect monday to thousands of tools via no-code platforms without development
features.evidence_quote: Connect via no-code platforms — Easily connect monday.com to thousands of other tools - no development needed.

features.name: two-way sync
features.description: Bidirectional data sync between monday and integrated external platforms
features.evidence_quote: Enable 2-way sync between monday products and any platform you work with

features.name: hierarchy and organization
features.description: Structured workspace hierarchy: workspace > board > group > item > sub-item
features.evidence_quote: Hierarchy & organization

features.name: 24/7 support
features.description: Round-the-clock customer support access
features.evidence_quote: 24/7 support

features.name: monday academy
features.description: Interactive courses and webinars for platform training and certification
features.evidence_quote: Academy — Interactive courses and webinars that will make you an expert

features.name: data storage and infrastructure
features.description: Enterprise-grade data storage powered by mondayDB with security compliance
features.evidence_quote: Data, infra & security — Drive your best work with mondayDB infrastructure

differentiators: AI agents described as an 'unlimited workforce' that runs work autonomously end-to-end
Trusted by over 60% of the Fortune 500
Single platform spanning work management, CRM, dev, service, and campaigns
Proprietary mondayDB in-house data engine built for scale
monday MCP enabling native AI model integrations via Model Context Protocol
monday vibe: AI-powered app builder that creates custom business apps in minutes
Agent Factory: no-code builder for deploying custom AI agents
AI woven natively into every product layer rather than bolted on

recent_ships.what: MondayDB — proprietary in-house data engine replacing third-party database infrastructure
recent_ships.source: HN: 'MondayDB: A new in-house data engine from monday.com' / 'Why Monday.com decided to build its new database instead of buying one'

recent_ships.what: monday vibe — AI-powered no-code app builder for creating custom business apps
recent_ships.source: Pricing page: 'Turn any business need into a custom business app in minutes' listed as core AI credit feature

recent_ships.what: AI agents (early access) — autonomous workforce of pre-built and custom agents (PMO, Sales, Incident, etc.)
recent_ships.source: Landing page: 'Your unlimited workforce that amplifies your team's impact' + agent gallery

recent_ships.what: monday MCP — Model Context Protocol server for AI tool connectivity
recent_ships.source: Integrations page: 'monday MCP' listed as platform capability

recent_ships.what: monday campaigns — dedicated email marketing product added to the platform suite
recent_ships.source: Integrations page: 'monday campaigns — For email marketing teams'

recent_ships.what: AI meeting notetaker — turns meeting conversations into actionable board items
recent_ships.source: Pricing page: 'Notetaker keeps your team focused during meetings and turns conversations into actionable insights'

recent_ships.what: AI workflow builder — orchestrates multi-agent AI workflows across teams (Pro+)
recent_ships.source: Pricing page: 'Orchestrate workflows that connect agents and AI and watch work get done across every team'

praised: "monday has all the functionalities and integrations we need without being unnecessarily complicated." — Naomi M., Head of Client Success
"monday.com's integrations with other software tools allow for seamless collaboration and project management across teams." — Ray A., Director of Customer Experience
"The integration available with Outlook has also helped ensure that important tasks received via emails are not missed." — Jim M., Real Estate Agent
HN discussions reflect curiosity and legitimacy as a category-leading tool ('Ask HN: Does anyone use monday.com? Is it better than the others?')
complaints: Pricing complexity — AI credits are bundled with tier pricing in a way that obscures true cost (observed from pricing page structure)
HN community building open-source alternatives (tillywork) suggests perceived over-pricing or feature lock-in
Security concerns raised: 'Ask HN: Did Monday.com's SendGrid service get compromised?' — third-party service risk flagged by community
G2 data unavailable for this extraction (page blocked)

free_tier.limits: 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 8 column types, no automations or integrations

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Up to 2 seats, 3 boards, 3 docs, 200+ templates, 8 column types, iOS/Android

tiers.name: Basic
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited items/viewers, 1,000 AI credits/mo, 1 vibe app, all Free features

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2,000 AI credits/mo, 250 automations+integrations/mo, Gantt+calendar, guest access, AI columns

tiers.name: Pro
tiers.headline_inclusions: 3,000 AI credits/mo, 25,000 automations+integrations/mo, private boards, time tracking, AI workflow builder

tiers.name: Enterprise
tiers.headline_inclusions: 20,000+ AI credits/mo, 250K automations/integrations, portfolio mgmt, enterprise security, SSO

pricing.notes: AI credits are a consumption currency bundled into each tier (1K/2K/3K/20K+ per month) and consumed by agents, sidekick, and notetaker. A promotional 'special offer' discount (~$10-$30/mo depending on tier for 10 seats) was active at time of scrape and nets AI credit cost to $0 effective. Annual billing saves ~18% vs monthly. Seat minimum not explicitly stated on pricing page. Prices shown are billed annually.
